creator: itetcu@FreeBSD.org
text:
mail/sylpheed-claws has been remanem upstream to claws-mail and the port has already been repocopied.
This PR adresses all the plugings and it's a consolidation of PRs 106576-106589 sunmitted by maintainer.

The folowing repocopies are needed in ports/mail:
sylpheed-claws-att_remover --> claws-mail-att_remover
sylpheed-claws-cachsaver --> claws-mail-cachsaver 
sylpheed-claws-etpan_privacy --> claws-mail-etpan_privacy
sylpheed-claws-fetchinfo --> claws-mail-fetchinfo
sylpheed-claws-gtkhtml2_viewer --> claws-mail-gtkhtml2_viewer
sylpheed-claws-maildir --> claws-mail-maildir 
sylpheed-claws-mailmbox --> claws-mail-mailmbox 
sylpheed-claws-newmail --> claws-mail-newmail 
sylpheed-claws-notification --> claws-mail-notification 
sylpheed-claws-perl --> claws-mail-perl 
sylpheed-claws-rssyl --> claws-mail-rssyl 
sylpheed-claws-smime --> claws-mail-smime 
sylpheed-claws-synce --> claws-mail-synce 
sylpheed-claws-vcalendar --> claws-mail-vcalendar

Thanks.
